arduinoota_config_auto.tooltip: Start OTA on the currently connected WiFi, add polling automatically, and send OTA events to the PC so one block enables OTA

arduinoota_begin.tooltip: Start OTA on the currently connected WiFi and send OTA events to the PC without adding loop polling automatically

arduinoota_poll.tooltip: Call repeatedly in loop to process uploads from Arduino IDE or the arduinoOTA tool

arduinoota_on_start.tooltip: Run when an OTA upload request starts

arduinoota_before_apply.tooltip: Run after firmware upload completes and before the update is applied

arduinoota_on_error.message0: when ArduinoOTA error code variable %1 message variable %2
arduinoota_on_error.tooltip: Run when an OTA request fails; code is an HTTP status code and message is the status text
